item.description: ### Changed - **A much richer Live Activity on your iPhone and Apple Watch.** The lock-screen card now uses its full canvas: a clear headline ("2 agents working"), a row for each active session with its own live timer, and — when Claude is working through a task list — a progress bar showing exactly how far along it is ("Task 4/5 · Hardening provisioning fallback"). When an agent needs you, the card flips to a bigger, clearer alert: what to approve, a full-width countdown, and what the rest of your fleet is doing. The Dynamic Island and the watch Smart Stack card pick up the task progress too. Pair with TestFlight build 24 of the companion app — older phone builds keep working with the old card.
